title: My life in Christ begins with my forgiveness.
declaration: My life in Christ begins with my forgiveness.

title: I have forgiveness through Jesus' blood.
declaration: I have forgiveness through Jesus' blood.

title: God is always ready to forgive me.
declaration: God is always ready to forgive me.

title: I should always be ready to forgive.
declaration: I should always be ready to forgive.

title: I choose not to judge others, but forgive.
declaration: I choose not to judge others, but forgive.

title: Loving one another means forgiving.
declaration: Loving one another means forgiving.

title: My forgiveness means I must forgive others.
declaration: My forgiveness means I must forgive others.

title: I am reconciled to God through Jesus Christ.
declaration: I am reconciled to God through Jesus Christ.

title: I am reconciled to God through the cross.
declaration: I am reconciled to God through the cross.

title: I am reconciled through the blood of Jesus.
declaration: I am reconciled through the blood of Jesus.

title: Jesus offers universal reconciliation and holiness.
declaration: Jesus offers universal reconciliation and holiness.

title: I need to be reconciled to one another.
declaration: I need to be reconciled to one another.

title: Reconciliation leads to living as a Godly community.
declaration: Reconciliation leads to living as a Godly community.

title: I bring the message of reconciliation to the world.
declaration: I bring the message of reconciliation to the world.

title: Submission requires my humility.
declaration: Submission requires my humility.

title: Submission to God's word leads me to purity.
declaration: Submission to God's word leads me to purity.

title: I choose to submit to God and have intimacy with God.
declaration: I choose to submit to God and have intimacy with God.

title: Submission to God is spiritual warfare I need to learn to fight.
declaration: Submission to God is spiritual warfare I need to learn to fight.

title: My submission to human authority is based on the Word of God.
declaration: My submission to human authority is based on the Word of God.

title: My submission is not just about external obedience.
declaration: My submission is not just about external obedience.

title: Jesus submitted to the will of the Father, and so will I.
declaration: Jesus submitted to the will of the Father, and so will I.

title: My love of Jesus leads me to keeping his commands.
declaration: My love of Jesus leads me to keeping his commands.

title: My obedience displays my love of God and others.
declaration: My obedience displays my love of God and others.

title: I choose to obey our church leaders with joy and pray for them.
declaration: I choose to obey our church leaders with joy and pray for them.

title: My obedience is not the basis for salvation it is the result.
declaration: My obedience is not the basis for salvation it is the result.

title: God desires obedience from my heart.
declaration: God desires obedience from my heart.

title: Obedience flows from my faith in God.
declaration: Obedience flows from my faith in God.

title: Obedience follows God rather than my desires.
declaration: Obedience follows God rather than my desires.

title: Jesus entered into Jerusalem with meekness.
declaration: Jesus entered into Jerusalem with meekness.

title: Jesus' house, the church, I, need to be the house of prayer.
declaration: Jesus' house, the church, I, need to be the house of prayer.

title: Thank you Jesus for your guidance and warning to prepare us.
declaration: Thank you Jesus for your guidance and warning to prepare us.
